news.summary: The 39th Security Forces Squadron certified airmen on the Common Remotely Operated Weapon Station for the first time at Incirlik Air Base, Turkey, supporting the 39th Air Base Wing's goal for airmen to be trained, equipped and ready.

news.headline: 'Endless fears': Even if fighting stops, the damage to Iran's children will endure
news.summary: The BBC has been able to obtain testimony from parents and those trying to help children deal with the distress that comes with war.

news.headline: First major Atlantic hurricane season outlook calls for below-average activity
news.summary: A developing “super El Niño” may reduce the number of storms in the Atlantic.
